rtm_coverage.evidence: curriculum.test.ts — exactly eleven modules, in documented order
curriculum.test.ts — banking_scenario non-empty per module (11 sub-tests)
curriculum.test.ts — vocabulary length ≥ 4 per module (11 sub-tests)
curriculum.test.ts — exercises length ≥ 1 per module (11 sub-tests)

Live Playwright run on https://1seansean1.github.io/helm/#/module/model-selection — Simulated exercise renders the canned response; live path tested unit-side with mocked fetch (anthropic.test.ts) verifying the exact URL/headers
Grep src/lib/ — only anthropic.ts references the apiKey; only callee is the direct browser fetch to api.anthropic.com; no analytics or telemetry imports anywhere in src/
anthropic.test.ts asserts the request URL begins with https://api.anthropic.com/; state.ts stores key only in localStorage 'helm.v1.state'; no other persistence
SettingsPage.tsx exposes Forget Key button calling forgetApiKey() which sets apiKey to empty string; state persists the empty value to localStorage
state.test.ts — computeOverall counts pass for 0/0, partial, and 100% cases
curl /manifest.webmanifest = 200; manifest contains 192/512/512-maskable icons, display=standalone, start_url=/helm/, scope=/helm/
vite-plugin-pwa generated sw.js with 16 precached entries (486 KiB) covering all static assets
LeadershipPage.tsx generates Markdown brief from state.progress; download triggers Blob+download anchor with .md filename
curriculum.test.ts — every exercise has non-empty simulated_response field (≥40 chars)
Grep src/components/ — all icon usage is lucide-react imports; no emoji codepoints in source
Playwright screenshot at desktop + mobile shows deep-navy + paper + gold palette, Fraunces serif headlines, Inter body, no monospace dominance
ExerciseRunner.tsx renders model select with three model IDs + temperature range + max_tokens select; values pass into callClaude request body
README.md present in repo root with curriculum, BYO-key, install, FAQ sections
